items.title: Amazing
items.summary: This game is absolutely fantastic. I have no idea why it isn’t more popular!! The artstyle is lovely, all of the splasharts look like they could belong in a wallpaper. The gameplay is really fun. For a gacha game you get a lot of pull currency and the rates are surprisingly good!! I would highly recommend checking this game out if you are a fan of Reverse:1999 or Chaos Zero Nightmare already. It’s like the lovechild of those two games.
items.author: ScribbleDaDragon

items.title: oh my goodness!!!!
items.summary: DEAR DEVS: this is the most amazing gocha game i've ever played in my entire 7yrs of playing gocha games, to say the very least without making this review too long i'll say this: before i found this game watching random top 10 gocha videos on youtube i was playing chaos zero nightmare and heaven burns red, those were my 2 games that i stuck with religiously, until i found this hidden gem.. after finding this game and sizing it up for a few days in order to be sure that its worth my time i've come to find that for me personally this is all i've ever needed in a gocha to say the least and i've uninstalled my other games from my phone since diving into this game cause honestly after playing such a fire and unique gocha like this one nothing else really makes sense playing in my opinion, most gochas are pretty much the same thing with tweaked art styles and maybe a change in the characters names lol other than that nothing in the gocha realm really sets its own tone, but this game is different and i love it so much, yeah its still a gocha but the way you guys executed the mechanics and art style is just something special to me and im in love.. despite how much i appreciate how simple yet complex the battle mechanics are and that you guys chose the deck building route, what really captured me is the art style and how dark and taboo everything is, im a dark person and favor anime's like tokyo ghoul death note and hellsing so the art and story presentation in this game is right down my lane.. i just wanna give the devs a big thanks for manifesting such a dope experience in the gocha realm we truly needed this rather other gocha players know it or not.. keep doing what your doing guys this game is absolutely AMAZING in every way.. to say the least i plan to main this game for a very long time, just please dont let it die and keep frequent content coming and you have me as a fan for life🖤🖤🖤🖤🖤🖤
items.author: Death_Witch
